---
title: "Stat 184 Free Throw Analysis"
author: "Robert Dang, Connor Box, Aidan Wieners"
date: today
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    colorlinks: true
execute:
  echo: false      
  warning: false  
  message: false
---

# Introduction

This report presents an exploratory data analysis of NBA player attributes and their relationship to free throw percentage among players with at least 150 free throw attempts. The goal is to investigate whether factors such as player role, physical characteristics, and playing time are associated with free throw shooting performance.

---

# Data Provenance



---

# FAIR and CARE Principles



---

# Data Cleaning and Feature Creation

Before analysis, the dataset was cleaned and transformed. This included:

- Removing percentage symbols from free throw percentage
- Removing commas from total minutes
- Converting variables to numeric format
- Creating new variables such as:
  - Free throw attempts per game
  - Minutes per game
  - Wingspan-to-height ratio

These transformations ensure that the data are consistent and suitable for analysis.

---

# Exploratory Data Analysis

## Robert

---

## Connor

---

## Aidan



---

# Overall Data Story



---

# Conclusion


---

# Open Science and Reproducibility



---

# Author Contributions

- Robert Dang: 
- Connor Box: 
- Aidan Wieners: 

---

# Appendix: Code
